---
name: 🔗 Domain Suggestion
about: Suggest a new affiliate domain or shortener for Purelink to unwrap.

labels: enhancement

---

**Is your domain request related to a specific store?**
(e.g. Amazon, Crocs, Chewy)

**Please provide an example link:**
(e.g. `https://mavely.app.link/e/XYZ`)

**What is the expected final URL?**
(If known, e.g. `https://www.store.com/product/123`)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about why this domain should be added.
